name: TrigramHash: BigramHash(10240, dim=96) + TrigramHash(10240, dim=32)
blurb: Non-record submission. Iso-parametric split of SOTA bigram(128) into bigram(96)+trigram(32). Total embed params unchanged (10240x128=10240x96+10240x32). TrigramHash captures 3-token co-occurrence patterns via hash (36313*t[i] XOR 27191*t[i-1] XOR 18731*t[i-2]) % mod. Zero-init, scale=0.05. Tested on 1xH100 (not 8xH100). All other hyperparameters identical to 2026-03-20_10L_Int5MLP_MuonWD04_SWA50.
author: fleeb83
